CaseMetadata.name: ad_prod_investigation_post_siem_demo_1000_events
CaseMetadata.summary: Synthetic but coherent post-SIEM filtered Active Directory investigation dataset. Built for ADFT demo flows where analysts start from high-signal SIEM evidence, pivot on a service account, confirm AD abuse, and observe pre-encryption ransomware impact.

profile.evidence_scope: high-signal AD and Windows events only
profile.recommended_use: GUI demo, timeline walkthrough, graph pivoting, LinkedIn/GitHub screenshots

phases: Explicit credential use and SMB pivot
Service account misuse and Kerberoasting burst
Remote service deployment and pre-encryption impact
notes: Designed for GUI demos where the graph must stay readable but still feel realistic.
This is not raw telemetry; routine noise was intentionally removed.
Use it as the investigative subset after SIEM filtering, then pivot to richer sources if needed.
